turn_info.content: Hello there, would you be able to give me some advice?

results.term: The first lockdown was bad enough but the second h...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: The first lockdown was bad enough but the second has really thrown me into despair. I simply cannot cope without being able to see friends and family for much longer.

results.term: I have run out of coping mechanisms!

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have run out of coping mechanisms!

results.term: I use facebook quite a lot and it helps but it can...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I use facebook quite a lot and it helps but it cannot compensate for face to face contact. I really need to be able to see people.

results.term: Well, part of the problem with that is that I am n...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, part of the problem with that is that I am not sure what the rules are any more! We have been told so many different things that I am out of the loop.

results.term: I always do wear a mask.. I think we legally have ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I always do wear a mask.. I think we legally have to :). I really miss little things like going out for coffee or to the gym though. It makes me feel like will never be the same again.

results.term: I have a little bit but I don't want to burden the...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have a little bit but I don't want to burden them. The other aspect is that it is making me anxious about many others things too. I keep having morbid thoughts about what will happen if the pandemic never ends.

results.term: That's why I'm here ;). You are being very helpful...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That's why I'm here ;). You are being very helpful, thank you! It's just nice to be able to tell people what I am worried about and not have them think that I am just being silly.

results.term: That does sound like really good advice. The other...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That does sound like really good advice. The other thing I haven't mentioned yet is that I have been having financial pressures because I am on furlough. I am worried that if this lasts much longer I will end up deep in debt.

results.term: I felt that you were very helpful. It is nice to j...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I felt that you were very helpful. It is nice to just know that someone is listening. I do not think that there is much in the way of local resources at the moment - everyone is very stretched.

results.term: I do feel better for having been able to talk to y...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I do feel better for having been able to talk to you about this - thank you very much!

results.term: I think I will be able to carry on for a bit now. ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I think I will be able to carry on for a bit now. Thanks again and best wishes!
